title: BlueScope Calls Revised Takeover Bid Inadequate, Open to Deal
description: Australia’s BlueScope Steel Ltd. said a revised bid from Steel Dynamics Inc. and SGH Ltd. undervalues the company, but remains open to a better offer.
content: Australia’s BlueScope Steel Ltd. said a revised bid from Steel Dynamics Inc. and SGH Ltd. undervalues the company, but remains open to a better offer.
